startPoint.en: Speak to Father Aereck in the Lumbridge Church, east of Lumbridge Castle.
startPoint.es: Habla con Father Aereck en la iglesia de Lumbridge, al este del Lumbridge Castle.

rewards.name: Gravestone
rewards.display: Access to gravestone upgrades by talking to Father Aereck

text.en: Talk to Father Aereck in Lumbridge Church.
text.es: Habla con Father Aereck en la iglesia de Lumbridge.

text.en: Go through the graveyard's southern exit and follow the shore to a mining site. Head west to a hut in the swamp.
text.es: Sal por la salida sur del cementerio y sigue la orilla hasta una zona minera. Dirígete al oeste hacia una cabaña en el pantano.

text.en: Talk to Father Urhney inside the hut.
text.es: Habla con Father Urhney dentro de la cabaña.

chatOptions: 2 Father Aereck sent me to talk to you.
1 A ghost is haunting his graveyard.

text.en: Go back to the graveyard and open a coffin located south of the catacombs.
text.es: Vuelve al cementerio y abre un ataúd situado al sur de las catacumbas.

text.en: Equip the Ghostspeak amulet and talk to the ghost.
text.es: Equípate el Ghostspeak amulet y habla con el fantasma.

chatOptions: 1 Yep. Now, tell me what the problem is.

text.en: Head back through the southern gate of the graveyard, keep walking until you reach the mining site once again.
text.es: Regresa por la puerta sur del cementerio y sigue caminando hasta llegar de nuevo a la zona minera.

text.en: Look south-east of the mining site, there are some rocks. Search the rocks, you will receive a muddy skull.
text.es: Mira al sureste de la zona minera, hay unas rocas. Registra las rocas y recibirás un muddy skull.

text.en: Kill the skeleton or run away.
Go back to the graveyard, reopen the coffin and use the skull on the open coffin.
text.es: Vuelve al cementerio, reabre el ataúd y usa el skull sobre el ataúd abierto.
